# SharedKind

SharedKind classifies metadata rows in examples.

 | Value | Meaning |
 |-------|---------|
 | UNSPECIFIED | default |
 | ALPHA | first variant |
 | BETA | second variant |
 | GAMMA | third variant |

```protobuf
enum [SharedKind](SharedKind.md) {
  SHARED_KIND_UNSPECIFIED = 0;
  SHARED_KIND_ALPHA = 1;
  SHARED_KIND_BETA = 2;
  SHARED_KIND_GAMMA = 3;
}
```
